title: neogaerrhinum strictum
intro: Neogaerrhinum strictum, also known as the strict gerrhinum, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Neogaerrhinum strictum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
